content.full_text:
Farn Por-rrrcAl PnacrrcEs CorraMrssroN
428 J Street. Suite 620 . Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660. Fax (916) 322-0886
February 14,2003
Velma A. Bowen
Post Office Box 358
Westport, CA 95488
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-026
Dear Ms. Bowen:
This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the provisions of the
Political Reform Act.r The Fair Political Piactices Commission provides iormal written advice
to anyone whose duties are in question under the Political Reform Act or their authorized
representative. (Government Code Section 831 14(b).) Under the provisions of regulation 18329
(bX2XA), certain information must be provided:
"(2) Requests for formal written advice will not be acted upon unless the
following requirements are met:
(A) The name, title or position, and mailing address of the person whose duties
are in question are provided. In addition, if the request is submitted by an
authorized representative, it shall contain a specific statement that such
authoization has been made."
Unless this information is submitted, your request for advice will be considered
withdrawn. Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to
contact me at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
JwWjg
I Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 -
18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
Re:
@

sections.question_synthetic: Ms. Bowen submitted a request for formal written advice under the Political Reform Act, but the FPPC determined that the request did not meet the statutory requirements for processing.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC cannot process the request for formal written advice because required information (name, title or position, and mailing address of the person whose duties are in question) was not provided. The request will be considered withdrawn unless this information is submitted.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a declination/withdrawal letter rather than a substantive advice letter. No QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present in standard format. The 'question_synthetic' and 'conclusion_synthetic' are derived from the body text explaining why the request cannot be processed.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Ms. Bowen submitted a request for formal written advice under the Political Reform Act, but the FPPC determined that the request did not meet the statutory requirements for processing.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC cannot process the request for formal written advice because required information (name, title or position, and mailing address of the person whose duties are in question) was not provided. The request will be considered withdrawn unless this information is submitted.

embedding.summary: This is an FPPC declination letter stating that a request for formal written advice from Velma A. Bowen cannot be acted upon because it fails to meet the regulatory requirements under Government Code Section 83114(b) and regulation 18329(b)(2)(A).
